title: Retry Failed Upload button, or Resync feature??
excerpt:
Recently I was at a job site, I was in the basement and made an update with pictures for future work to be done, then I received a message about the photo not being able to upload due to internet connection. 
After that …

posts.author: Ryley (ryley legault)
posts.cookedHtml:
Recently I was at a job site, I was in the basement and made an update with pictures for future work to be done, then I received a message about the photo not being able to upload due to internet connection.

After that I head up onto the roof and made another update with photos for work to be done and the pictures worked because I came into cell phone reception.

I arrived home and looked at the updates on my computer, only the photos that were uploaded while in cell reception on the roof are in the updates. the photos taken in the basement were not there, But the text part of the update that were made in the basement are there.

only way to add the photos to the updates that are missing the photos were to download the photos from the updates on my phone and re upload them as a reply to the update.

I’m surprised that the photos didn’t upload once I got into cell service.

A Retry failed button would be a nice feature as I work in areas with no cell reception very often and it may become an annoying issue if I have a large number of updates/photos that I will basically have to do twice.

Just a thought from my experience today.
